creator: pclin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

It shows correct search result on my machine,
Did you ever try to rebuild your INDEX?

==
$ cd /usr/ports; make search name=scan_ffs
Port:   scan_ffs-1.2
Path:   /usr/ports/sysutils/scan_ffs
Info:   Scan_ffs recovers lost disklabel
Maint:  michael@ranner.eu
B-deps:
R-deps:
WWW: 

$
==

- pclin
